data.title: Fisher & Paykel Unveils Nature--Ritual at EuroCucina 2026, Elevating Everyday Routines into Timeless Rituals
data.description: Unveiled at EuroCucina in Milan, Fisher & Paykel, the luxury appliance brand from Aotearoa New Zealand within the Haier Group global portfolio, presented Nature—Ritual, a 450m² immersive installation showcasing the State of the Art Collection.

data.title: Nel ASA: Receives a USD 7 million purchase order for PEM equipment to be deployed in the US
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 23, 2026, Nel Hydrogen US, a branch of Nel ASA, announced the reception of a purchase order totaling approximately USD 7 million for PEM electrolyser equipment. This equipment is intended for the production of hydrogen at a public utility.

data.title: Essity: Interim Report Quarter 1, 2026
data.description: The first quarter of 2026 has been promising with positive developments – increased volumes and improved margins in STOCKHOLM. Net sales for this period saw a 5.1% decrease, totaling SEK 33,177 million compared to the previous figure of SEK 34,976 million. However, after excluding currency translation effects, there was a net increase of SEK 528 million in sales. Organically, sales grew by 0.4%, suggesting stable growth in the business.

data.title: InnoCORE Returns in 2026 with Expanded Global Postdoctoral Job Fair
data.description: In a recent announcement made in New York, Boston, and San Jose, California, it was revealed that the Korean government will be organizing the 2026 InnoCORE Global Postdoctoral Job Fair in the United States. This event aims to attract postdoctoral researchers to work in Korean institutions. This initiative highlights the ongoing efforts to bridge global talent to Korea.

data.title: Survey of 81,000 AI users by Anthropic shows job displacement fear and productivity gains, especially among young workers.
data.description: The results of a survey conducted by Anthropic involving 81,000 users of Artificial Intelligence (AI) have been released. The survey revealed significant findings, showing that job displacement fears were prevalent among respondents. Additionally, it was reported that there were boosts in productivity noted by participants. The analysis further indicated that individuals in the early stages of their careers, as well as those who have high exposure to AI technologies, expressed the most concerns regarding job displacement.

data.title: Tech. For Family: CHERY VPD World Premiere Concludes, Ushering in a Warm Era of Intelligent Parking
data.description: Yesterday in Beijing, the global premiere of CHERY VPD took place with the unveiling of its new functions "One-Tap Departure" and "One-Step Homecoming" centered around the theme "Tech. For Family." This innovative technology is powered by end-to-end large model tech and aims to tackle worldwide parking challenges. Up to 93% of users worldwide face parking difficulties, making this new technology a potentially game-changing solution for many.

data.title: Moomoo launches API Skills facility, a first in Australia and New Zealand
data.description: Moomoo, a renowned global trading platform, has introduced Moomoo API Skills, a cutting-edge professional feature, marking a significant milestone in the industry. This launch represents the first of its kind in the local market and is set to revolutionize trading experiences for users. With this offering, Moomoo is poised to enhance the trading landscape by providing advanced tools and resources to its users, setting a new standard in the industry.

data.title: Anthropic rolls out monthly AI Economic Impact Survey, tracking impact on jobs, productivity, and workforce transitions.
data.description: Anthropic has launched the Economic Index Survey, a monthly tracking tool aiming to monitor the influence of artificial intelligence on employment, productivity, and shifts in the workforce. This initiative will provide regular insights into how AI is shaping these sectors, offering valuable data on job trends and productivity changes. This survey will regularly update stakeholders with essential information on the evolving landscape, offering a comprehensive view of AI's impact on the economy.
